text.title: Tailwind Architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Tailwind Architecture. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Codebase has 600 occurrences of `w-[Npx]` and `bg-[#hex]`; rebrand requires grep-replace.
antipattern.root-cause: No ESLint rule banning arbitrary values.
antipattern.fix: Add `tailwindcss/no-arbitrary-value` (or equivalent); migrate values into tailwind.config / @theme.

antipattern.symptom: Conditional bg colour ignores override; class string ends with conflicting bg-* and the last in source string wins.
antipattern.root-cause: Code used raw clsx without tailwind-merge.
antipattern.fix: Switch to project cn() wrapping clsx + tailwind-merge; add lint rule to ban raw clsx joins.

antipattern.symptom: CSS bundle grew 40% after a feature; JIT tree-shaking ineffective.
antipattern.fix: Move @apply to @layer components in a CSS file OR convert to a primitive component; remove from .tsx.

antipattern.symptom: PR diffs full of class reorder noise; merge conflicts on unrelated lines.
antipattern.fix: Install plugin + format once; ban manual reorder in review.
